name: Cobblestones Right
description: Cobblestones Right is a fun, mellow right-hand reef break that peels over a combination of reef and sand bottom. It’s a user-friendly wave, ideal for flowy carves and playful lines rather than barrels. The wave starts with a soft roll-in, then walls up for open-face turns before tapering off into the deeper channel. On a good swell, it can hold size and provide long, rippable walls.
hazards: can get very fast and hollow
